description.en: The China Insurance Association (CIA) is the national self-regulatory organization of China's insurance industry, established under the supervision of the China Financial Regulatory Commission. It represents insurance companies, insurance intermediaries, and other insurance-related institutions operating in China. CIA publishes comprehensive statistical data on China's insurance market, including premium income by product line, insurance density and depth, claims data, investment assets, and industry financial summaries. Its annual China Insurance Yearbook and regular statistical bulletins are authoritative references for analyzing trends in life insurance, property insurance, reinsurance, and the health insurance sector.
description.zh: 中国保险行业协会（保险业协会）是中国保险行业的全国性自律组织，在国家金融监督管理总局的监督指导下开展工作。协会汇聚国内各保险公司、保险中介机构及相关机构，发布中国保险市场的全面统计数据，包括各险种保费收入、保险密度与深度、理赔数据、投资资产规模及行业财务概况。《中国保险年鉴》及定期统计公报是分析人身险、财产险、再保险和健康险市场趋势的权威参考。

en: Premium income: total and by product line (life, property, health, accident), national and provincial breakdown
Insurance density and depth: per-capita premium and premium-to-GDP ratio by region and year
Claims and indemnity: total claims paid, claim ratios, catastrophe payouts
Insurance company financial data: assets, liabilities, solvency ratios, investment returns
Market structure: number of insurers, market share by company, premium ranking
Policy counts: number of policies in force and new policies by insurance category
Reinsurance: domestic and cross-border reinsurance premium ceded and assumed
Health insurance: medical, critical illness, and long-term care insurance statistics
Agricultural insurance: policy coverage and premium income from crop and livestock insurance
China Insurance Yearbook: comprehensive annual statistical compilation of the insurance industry
zh: 保费收入：各险种（人身险、财产险、健康险、意外险）保费总量及分省数据
保险深度与密度：各地区人均保费及保费占GDP比例的历年数据
理赔与赔付：已决赔款总额、赔付率、重大灾害赔付情况
保险公司财务数据：总资产、负债、偿付能力充足率、投资收益率
市场结构：保险公司数量、市场份额、保费收入排名
保单数量：各险种有效保单数量及新增保单量
再保险：国内及跨境再保险分出分入保费情况
健康险：医疗险、重大疾病险、长期护理险等健康保险统计数据
农业保险：农业（种植业、养殖业）保险覆盖及保费收入
中国保险年鉴：保险业全面年度统计汇编
